category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an HTTP and gRPC load testing and visualization tool and server; official README describes HTTP/gRPC load generation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is fortio; official website and repository use Fortio.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides command-line documentation; official GitHub wiki FAQ adds project guidance.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/fortio/fortio; per instruction, repo is not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe HTTP/gRPC load generation, benchmarking, server, and visualization functions.
